title: Chief Marketing Officer
description: End-to-end marketing leadership for a $1.5B annual revenue organization spanning three B2B businesses and two B2C brands in racing, wagering, and entertainment.
highlights: 67% revenue growth while reducing costs 2.7%, contributing to 22% EBITDA CAGR over four years
Reduced customer acquisition costs by 56% and improved LTV/CAC by 73% via customer data platform
Directed go-to-market for new wagering app: $60M handle and $4M net gaming revenue in 10 months
Secured board-approved budget growth from $8M to $15M through comprehensive ROI forecasting

title: VP, Digital Marketing & eCommerce → VP, Corporate IT
description: Progressively promoted through digital marketing leadership to VP of Digital Marketing & eCommerce, then recruited internally to lead corporate digital transformation as VP of IT.
highlights: $36M incremental direct-channel revenue from $13M capital investment in new website and booking engine
Reversed 5-year negative trend with 24 consecutive months of growth and 50% ROAS improvement
18% CRM conversion rate increase via 360-degree customer data platform
Designed and led global cloud governance program across U.S., Singapore, and China

title: Chief Commercial Officer
description: Executive leadership across sales, marketing, product, customer success, operations, and finance for a global gaming technology platform.
highlights: 18% increase in B2B customers in 9 months via CRM platform deployment
14% increase in registered players through payments and subscription launch strategy
Architected operational structure; hired key roles across sales, marketing, product, and finance

title: Strategic Marketing Advisor
description: Boutique consulting practice focused on strategic marketing, digital transformation, and AI enablement for executive teams.
highlights: Advised executives on marketing strategy, customer acquisition, CRM, and AI enablement
Directed agency selection and operating model redesign to improve accountability and performance
Designed customer journey, CRM, and AI-driven workflow architectures
